questions.q: The main objective of the Multi-Fibre Arrangement (MFA) was to
questions.answer: to regulate the flow of textiles and clothing into developed countries

questions.q: Which of the following is a major advantage of globalization?
Explain the concept of comparative advantage in international trade. (10 marks)
questions.answer: Comparative advantage is a concept in international trade where a country specializes in producing goods for which it has a lower opportunity cost compared to other countries. This leads to increased trade and efficiency.

questions.q: India's foreign trade policy aims to increase exports of which sector?
What is the main reason for the decline of the textile industry in India?
questions.answer: Rise of imports from China and other countries

questions.q: Which of the following is a major disadvantage of globalization?
Explain the concept of GATT and its significance in international trade. (10 marks)
questions.answer: GATT (General Agreement on Tariffs and Trade) is an international treaty that aims to reduce trade barriers and promote free trade. It was established in 1947 and has had a significant impact on international trade, leading to increased trade and economic growth.
USA, China, and the European Union

questions.q: What is the main reason for India's trade deficit?
Explain the concept of WTO and its significance in international trade. (10 marks)
questions.answer: WTO (World Trade Organization) is an international organization that aims to promote free trade and economic growth. It was established in 1995 and has had a significant impact on international trade, leading to increased trade and economic growth.
